CookieBanner.text: We use necessary technical cookies and, with your consent, analytics and profiling cookies.
CookieBanner.title: Cookie preferences
CookieBanner.necessaryDesc: Essential for the site to work (authentication, session, security).
CookieBanner.analyticsDesc: Aggregated statistics to improve the platform.
CookieBanner.profilingDesc: Personalised content and recommendations based on interests.
CookieBanner.marketingDesc: Relevant promotional communications, including from third parties.

Auth.confirmSent: We've sent you a confirmation email. Check your inbox.
Auth.errNotConfirmed: You must confirm your email before signing in.
Auth.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Auth.errCallback: Email confirmation failed. Please try signing in again.
Auth.notConfigured: Authentication is not configured in this environment.
Auth.consentRequired: I have read and accept the <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> and the <terms>Terms of Service</terms>
Auth.consentRequiredError: You must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service to register.
Auth.consentMarketing: I agree to receive marketing and promotional communications by email
Auth.consentProfiling: I agree to profiling to receive personalised content and recommendations
Auth.consentThirdParty: I agree to share my data with selected partners

page.heroSubtitle: Watch the best of beach volleyball and sand sports, your way.

faq.a: Yes. Premium has no lock-in — cancel anytime from your account settings.

faq.q: How many devices can I watch on?
faq.a: With Premium you can follow SANDR across multiple devices: smart TV, computer, tablet and smartphone.
PPV gives you access to a single event in HD, with no subscription. Access stays valid for 48 hours.

faq.q: What's the difference between Free and Premium?
faq.a: Free offers highlights and one free match per week in SD. Premium unlocks all live and replays in HD, with offline download and priority support.
